description:
Code half of bl-934a (§11/§6/§9 spec, commit forthcoming).

(1) Worktree-path field. The bl-delivery plugin gains claim.pre + unclaim.pre hooks:
 - claim.pre: compute worktree_path(binding, id, claimant) and write it into the staged
   frontmatter under the plugin-namespaced preserved key 'delivery-worktree' (§3 seam),
   so the seal captures it and 'bl show --json' surfaces it authoritatively.
 - unclaim.pre: clear that key, in lockstep with core clearing claimant.
 The field travels with claimant (present iff claimed); the plugin still RECOMPUTES the
 path for its own materialize/release/rollback and never READS the stored copy (stateless
 property preserved — the key is purely consumer-facing). claim.post still materializes +
 prints the path on stdout (the human hint) unchanged. Wire claim.pre/unclaim.pre =
 [bl-delivery] into the seed plugins.toml [hooks] table.

(2) delivered_in recency-ordering. The derived 'git log --grep [bl-id]' integration-branch
 query (src/delivery.rs) must recency-order results: the k-th-most-recent dead incarnation
 (from balls/tasks history, §9) maps to the k-th-most-recent [bl-id] integration commit
 (deliveries are monotonic with incarnations — a reused id only begins after the prior one
 closed). Resolves the id-reuse cross-incarnation ambiguity bl-d7a5 deferred, WITHOUT a
 stored field. (NB: full benefit needs the §9 dead-ball recency walk in 'bl show', the
 pending bl-206c.)

Spec: docs/architecture.md §11 (path-staging para + delivered_in recency note), §6 (hooks
table), §9 (claim/unclaim prose), §15 entry under bl-934a. 100% coverage + 300-line gates apply.

issue.last_synced_title: Delivery plugin: stage worktree-path frontmatter key at claim.pre/clear at unclaim.pre; recency-order the delivered_in query (bl-934a impl) [bl-ae51]

title: Delivery plugin: stage worktree-path frontmatter key at claim.pre/clear at unclaim.pre; recency-order the delivered_in query (bl-934a impl)
